title: Amei um Bicheiro
writer: Anselmo Duarte, Jorge Dória, Marcelo Dória
actors: Cyl Farney, Eliana Macedo, Grande Otelo
plot: Intent on offering his fiancée a better life, countryman heads for Rio de Janeiro in search of a place in the sun. With no contacts in the big city, he gets involved with the crime underworld connected with illegal betting.
